# FutureStack 2026 — Registration Tier Design

**Generated by: Finance & Registration skill**

---

**Event:** FutureStack 2026
**Dates:** October 15--16, 2026
**Venue:** Metro Convention Center, Austin, TX
**Capacity:** 800 attendees

---

## Registration Tiers

| Tier | Price | Availability | Cap | Includes |
|---|---:|---|---:|---|
| **Early-Bird** | $395 | May 1 -- Aug 15, 2026 | 250 | Full 2-day conference access, meals & breaks, swag bag, recordings access (30 days post-event) |
| **Standard** | $595 | Aug 16 -- Oct 14, 2026 (or sellout) | 380 | Full 2-day conference access, meals & breaks, swag bag, recordings access (30 days post-event) |
| **VIP** | $1,295 | May 1 -- Oct 10, 2026 | 50 | Everything in Standard, plus: front-row reserved seating (all keynotes), exclusive speaker dinner (Oct 14 evening), green room lounge access, priority Q&A, VIP badge & lanyard, recordings access (perpetual) |
| **Student** | $95 | May 1 -- Oct 10, 2026 | 80 | Full 2-day conference access, meals & breaks, digital-only swag (no physical kit). Valid .edu email or student ID required at check-in. |
| **Speaker Comp** | $0 | By invitation only | 30 | Full 2-day conference access, meals & breaks, speaker dinner, green room access, reserved seating, hotel (2 nights), travel reimbursement per speaker agreement |
| **Sponsor Comp** | $0 | Allocated per sponsorship agreement | 10 | Full 2-day conference access, meals & breaks, sponsor badge. Allocated: Platinum (4 passes), Gold (2 passes each). |

---

## Tier Details

### Early-Bird ($395)

- Available from general on-sale (May 1) through August 15, 2026 at 11:59 PM CT.
- Priced at a 34% discount to standard registration.
- Once the 250-seat cap is reached, early-bird pricing closes regardless of date.
- Non-transferable to VIP; upgrade available by paying the $900 difference.

### Standard ($595)

- Opens automatically when early-bird closes or sells out.
- Door price (walk-up day-of) is also $595, subject to availability.
- Single-day passes are **not** offered for FutureStack 2026.

### VIP ($1,295)

- Limited to 50 attendees to maintain exclusivity.
- VIP speaker dinner held the evening of October 14 at a private venue TBA.
- Green room lounge open both days, 8 AM -- 6 PM, with complimentary refreshments.
- Front-row block: rows 1--3 in the main keynote hall, reserved with VIP badge scan.
- Perpetual access to all recorded sessions (no 30-day expiration).

### Student ($95)

- Must present valid student ID or verification from a .edu email address.
- Verification occurs at check-in; unverified attendees must pay the standard rate difference.
- No physical swag bag; digital resources and session recordings (30 days) provided.

### Speaker Comp

- Managed by the Program & Content skill; registrations created upon speaker confirmation.
- Includes travel reimbursement up to $1,500 domestic / $2,500 international.
- Speaker dinner attendance is expected (not optional) unless a conflict is communicated.

### Sponsor Comp

- Pass allocation defined in sponsorship agreements. Not available for purchase.
- Sponsor comp badges are visually distinct (gold border) and include booth access.

---

## Promo Codes

| Code | Discount | Valid Period | Max Uses | Notes |
|---|---:|---|---:|---|
| `FUTURESTACK-LAUNCH` | 15% off Standard | May 1 -- May 31 | 100 | Launch week campaign |
| `COMMUNITY25` | 25% off Standard | Jun 1 -- Sep 30 | 50 | Community partner referral |
| `SPEAKER-FRIEND` | 20% off Standard | Jul 1 -- Oct 10 | 60 | Speaker referral program (unique per speaker) |
| `ALUMNI-FS25` | $100 off Standard | Jun 1 -- Aug 31 | 200 | Returning attendees from FutureStack 2025 |
| `DEVREL-COMP` | 100% off Standard | May 1 -- Oct 10 | 10 | DevRel community leaders (approval required) |
| `GROUP5PLUS` | 10% off Standard | May 1 -- Oct 10 | Unlimited | Auto-applied for 5+ registrations; see Group Discounts |

> Promo codes cannot be combined. Only one code per registration. Codes do not apply to VIP or Student tiers unless explicitly noted.

---

## Group Discount Structure

| Group Size | Discount | How to Redeem |
|---:|---:|---|
| 5--9 registrations | 10% off per ticket | Use code `GROUP5PLUS` or contact registration@futurestack.dev |
| 10--19 registrations | 15% off per ticket | Contact registration@futurestack.dev for a custom invoice |
| 20+ registrations | 20% off per ticket + 1 comp pass | Contact registration@futurestack.dev for a custom invoice |

**Group discount terms:**
- All registrations must be submitted in a single transaction or coordinated batch.
- Group discounts apply to Standard tier only. VIP and Student are excluded.
- Payment by invoice (Net 15) available for groups of 10+.
- Group organizer receives a complimentary pass for groups of 20+.
- Cancellation of individual registrations within a group may retroactively adjust the discount tier.

---

## Refund Policy

| Cancellation Window | Refund |
|---|---|
| 60+ days before event (before Aug 16) | Full refund minus $25 processing fee |
| 30--59 days before event (Aug 16 -- Sep 15) | 50% refund |
| 15--29 days before event (Sep 16 -- Sep 30) | 25% refund, or full credit toward FutureStack 2027 |
| 14 days or fewer before event (Oct 1+) | No refund; full credit toward FutureStack 2027 |

**Additional refund terms:**
- Refunds are processed within 10 business days to the original payment method.
- Name changes / transfers are permitted free of charge up to October 1. After that date, a $50 transfer fee applies.
- Speaker and Sponsor comp passes are non-refundable (no cost incurred).
- In the event of a force majeure cancellation by the organizer, all attendees receive a full refund.
- Refund requests must be submitted via registration@futurestack.dev.

---

## Waitlist Rules

1. **Activation:** A waitlist opens automatically when any tier reaches its cap or when general registration sells out.
2. **Notification:** Waitlisted registrants are notified by email in the order they joined. They have **48 hours** to complete registration before the spot is offered to the next person.
3. **No charge until confirmed:** Credit cards are not charged at the time of waitlist signup.
4. **Tier-specific waitlists:** Each tier maintains its own waitlist. A waitlisted VIP applicant is not automatically offered a Standard ticket.
5. **Cancellation releases:** When a paid registrant cancels, their spot is released to the waitlist for that tier within 1 business day.
6. **Waitlist cap:** The waitlist itself is capped at 200 across all tiers. Once the waitlist is full, no further signups are accepted.
7. **Final cutoff:** The waitlist closes on October 10, 2026 (5 days before the event) to allow time for badge production and catering headcount finalization.

---

## Registration Platform

- **Platform:** Tito (ti.to/futurestack/2026)
- **Payment processors:** Stripe (credit/debit), PayPal, wire transfer (invoiced groups only)
- **Currencies accepted:** USD only
- **Accessibility:** Registration form is WCAG 2.1 AA compliant
- **Data collected:** Name, email, company, role, dietary requirements, T-shirt size, accessibility needs
